---
title: ""
description: "Lukas Mayer's personal website - research in Cognitive Science, AI, Data Science/statistics, software development, tech tips, and life-style posts."
about:
 template: jolla
 links:
   - icon: github
     text: Github
     href: https://github.com/lukmayer
   - icon: medium
     text: Medium
     href: https://medium.com/@willuk
   - icon: envelope
     text: Email
     href: mailto:willuk@vivaldi.net
format: 
  html:
    toc: false
back-to-top-navigation: false
---

<style>
/* CSS for fade-in effect */
.fade-in {
  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 2s ease-in;
}

.fade-in.loaded {
  opacity: 1;
}
</style>


<script>
  window.addEventListener("load", function() {
    var image = document.querySelector(".fade-in");
    if (image.complete) {
      image.classList.add("loaded");
    } else {
      image.addEventListener("load", function() {
        image.classList.add("loaded");
      });
    }
  });
</script>



::: {.text-center}

![](assets/luke-23.jpg){.circle .fade-in width=45% height=45% alt="Lukas/Luke William Mayer"}
:::

# Lukas W. Mayer

---

### Welcome to my website!

{{< animate fadeIn "I'm Luke, and I'm currently a PhD Student in Cognitive Science at the University of California, Irvine.
In my research, I investigate the limits of human causal reasoning through Bayesian computational models.
I'm particularly interested in applying these models to enhance human-AI collaboration." duration=6s >}}
